name: ASUS EX-B760M-V7, Intel® B760 (LGA 1700) mATX motherboard DDR5, PCIe® 4.0, 10 power stages, Realtek 2.5 Gb Ethernet, HDMI, DP, USB 5Gbps, luminous anti-moisture coating, Lightning Boot
